title: Span Events, Links & Git Metadata
description: Attaching structured events, causal links, and source-code Git metadata to spans in the DDTrace PHP library

use_cases.name: Attach Named Event to Span
use_cases.description: Developer creates a SpanEvent with a name, optional attributes, and optional nanosecond timestamp, then appends it to SpanData::$events[]

use_cases.name: Record Exception on Span
use_cases.description: Developer wraps a Throwable in ExceptionSpanEvent (subclass of SpanEvent) and attaches it to the span, preserving the full exception object alongside standard event attributes

use_cases.name: Link Span to Another Span/Trace
use_cases.description: Developer creates a SpanLink referencing another span's traceId + spanId (32/16-char hex), optional traceState and attributes, and appends to SpanData::$links[]

use_cases.name: Get Pre-populated SpanLink from Current Span
use_cases.description: SpanData::getLink() returns a SpanLink pre-populated with the current span's traceId and spanId, to be attached to a downstream span
use_cases.api: $link = $spanData->getLink(); // returns SpanLink with current trace/span IDs

use_cases.name: Build SpanLink from Distributed Tracing Headers
use_cases.description: SpanLink::fromHeaders() consumes distributed tracing headers (as array map or callback) and constructs a SpanLink, enabling cross-service causal linking

use_cases.name: Attach Git Metadata to Root Span
use_cases.description: The runtime reads Git repository metadata (commit SHA, repo URL) from the environment/filesystem and attaches it to the root span via SpanData::$gitMetadata for source code integration in Datadog UI

use_cases.name: Bridge OTel addEvent to DDTrace SpanEvent
use_cases.description: When OTel Span::addEvent() is called, the bridge creates a DDTrace SpanEvent and appends to the underlying SpanData::$events[], preserving OTel event reference via ObjectKVStore

use_cases.name: Bridge OTel addLink to DDTrace SpanLink
use_cases.description: When OTel Span::addLink() is called, the bridge calls createAndSaveSpanLink() which populates a DDTrace SpanLink from SpanContextInterface and stores the OTel LinkInterface via ObjectKVStore

use_cases.name: Serialize Events/Links to JSON
use_cases.description: SpanEvent and SpanLink both implement JsonSerializable; the runtime calls jsonSerialize() when exporting spans to the Datadog agent

key_classes.name: SpanData
key_classes.note: Central span data object; holds collections of events, links, and optional git metadata

key_relationships: SpanData composes GitMetadata (optional, for root span)
SpanData::getLink() produces SpanLink pre-populated with own IDs
OTel Span wraps SpanData (bridge pattern); addEvent/addLink delegate to SpanData
SpanLink::fromHeaders() is a factory consuming distributed tracing propagation headers
important_notes: SpanLink::$traceId must NOT be directly assigned from SpanData::$id — use SpanData::getLink() instead (different encoding)
SpanLink and SpanEvent are defined in the C extension (ddtrace.stub.php), not pure PHP files
ObjectKVStore is used in OTel bridge to maintain bidirectional OTel↔DDTrace object references
GitMetadata is auto-populated by the DDTrace runtime from git filesystem (refs/heads/master, remote URL); not set manually by developers in normal usage
SpanEvent timestamp is in nanoseconds; defaults to current Unix time if null
droppedAttributesCount on SpanLink is always 0 (attribute limits not enforced in DDTrace)
Both SpanEvent and SpanLink implement JsonSerializable for Datadog agent serialization
